## What are you adding?

<!-- Describe the skill(s) you're adding or the change you're making -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The skill solves a real business problem (not just a developer tool)
- [ ] The description is clear and concise (1-2 sentences)
- [ ] The skill is placed in the correct category
- [ ] I checked for duplicates in the existing list
- [ ] Runtime tags are included (`openclaw`, `hermes`, or both)
- [ ] Any links point to live, working pages
- [ ] The entry follows the format in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
